details: The agent executed appropriate commands (pr view with --comments --full flags), retrieved all required information, and produced a complete, accurate briefing covering: title ('Gateway: harden OpenResponses file-context escaping'), author (joshavant), body summary (centralized helper, escaping logic, no API changes), CI checks (27 passed, 4 failed, 10 skipped, 41 total), and a thorough summary of the single Greptile bot comment with its 5/5 confidence score.
